  • Craveable Grains

    Ingredients: ** No Alliums: this includes garlic, onion, shallots, leeks, chives, scallions/ green onions, and any similar wild varieties, such as ramps. ** No Root vegetables/Tubers: this includes potatoes of any variety, beets, carrots, radishes, turnips, ginger, and fresh turmeric root. ** No Mushrooms/Fungi of any kind.

    Made on shared equipment with

Disclaimer: The ingredient and allergen information on this page are subject to change without notification. While we take many precautions to correctly identify ingredients and prevent cross-contact with food allergens, we are unable to guarantee the absence of potential food allergens in our food or facilities.
